bug_classification.reasoning: Architectural regression in REQ-GH-253 implementation. The state-machine pipeline fires correctly per turn but the composers it drives emit a thin index of their inputs (state name, filename references, section names) instead of inlining the content the references point at. rolling-state.create() has no payload accumulator. Result: LLM is forced to recall format specs and prior-stage content from roundtable-analyst.md, exactly the failure mode the state machine was built to remove.
